entries.text: Esta llamada puede ser grabada para propósitos de calidad y entrenamiento. Para Español, oprima el 2.
Thanks for calling pivot point orthopedics part of pretty good AI am I speaking with Maria
Hi, this is Emily Davis. I'm actually calling to book a dermatology appointment.
Thanks for letting me know Emily
Pivot Point Orthopedics is an orthopedic clinic, so we don't offer dermatology appointments.
Oh, I'm sorry, I must've dialed the wrong number. I'll go ahead and find the right office. Thanks anyway.
Would you like help booking an orthopedic or physical therapy visit instead?
If you ever need orthopedic care, feel free to call us. Have a great day.
